_comment: ILLUSTRATIVE EXAMPLE ONLY — All values are fictional and for demonstration purposes only. This is not a real facility report.

boundary_statement.energy_includes: All utility feed power, PDU metering, IT load, cooling systems, lighting, and security systems within campus boundary
boundary_statement.energy_excludes: Backup diesel generators (emergency use only, <0.1% of annual energy), employee vehicle charging stations
boundary_statement.water_withdrawn_definition: Total volume removed from municipal supply and on-site wells
boundary_statement.water_consumed_definition: Volume not returned to any water body (evaporative losses, product water)
boundary_statement.water_returned_definition: Volume discharged to municipal wastewater system after treatment

metrics.name: PUE
metrics.notes: Unaudited self-reported value. Includes all campus loads within boundary.

metrics.name: WUE
metrics.methodology_reference: Industry standard methodology; evaporative cooling dominant
metrics.notes: Climate zone: humid continental (Koppen Dfa). Seasonal variation: 0.4 (winter) to 1.3 (summer).

metrics.name: CUE
metrics.methodology_reference: Grid carbon intensity from EPA eGRID 2024 × total facility energy
metrics.notes: Derived from regional grid average. Does not account for time-of-use carbon variation.

evidence_register.verification_method: Utility meter readings + PDU telemetry, monthly aggregation
Municipal water meter + cooling tower blowdown meter
EPA eGRID 2024 regional average × metered energy
